abstract.text: Multiply two inputs together. It will do broadcast if needed.
An optimizer encapsulated the logic to update parameters in order to minimize the loss.
Square root of a input. It will not do broadcast.
This protocol defines a generic constructs such that we can use DynamicGraph.AnyTensorGroup
to represent either a collection of tensors from multiple GPUs or one tensor.
It has a typed version DynamicGraph.TensorGroup to enforce type constraint.
A stream context is an object that an execution can be performed upon.
Add two inputs together. It will do broadcast if needed.
Comlex number multiplication over two inputs.
MSE loss. Currently it does reduce mean.
Div two inputs together. It will not do broadcast.
Hint are parameters to these operations that changes shape from input
to output. It given proper stride / padding parameters for these operations.
The kind of devices the tensor resides on.
Represent a type-checked parameters that encapsulate both tensor and group of tensors.
Multiply all values with a constant.
A segmented linear layer model that makes more sense in the lenses of MoE.
Data types for a given tensor.
A pandas-inspired dataframe. Dataframe is a tabular data representation. This particular
Dataframe implementation is most useful to implement data feeder pipeline. You need some
transformations so some text or images can be transformed into tensors for a model to consume.
Dataframe can be used to implement that pipeline.
A model is a base class for stateful operations on a dynamic graph. It can be
use to construct computations statically, thus, more efficient.
Softmax cross-entropy loss. This combines softmax with cross-entropy loss to maximize
The masked fill model. If the value equal to a given constant, fill with another constant.
Protocol for other places to recognize AnyTensor and AnyGroup with static dispatch.
Make the input tensor to be 1-D tensor (respecting N).
A dynamic graph is a workspace for computations. All tensor variables can be tracked
Empty protocol for other places to recognize AnyTensor and AnyGroup with dynamic dispatch.
Sigmoid cross-entropy loss. This combines sigmoid with binary cross-entropy loss to maximize
A model builder is a more generic type of model. A model can be quite static,
thus, you have to be quite careful to have a model work with dynamic inputs.
You cannot use reshape, or anything that can generate fixed tensor outputs from
